task_updates.executor_notes: Threaded gallery selection state through `MediaGallery` into `MediaGalleryGrid`, added optional `isSelected` support on `MediaGalleryItem`, and applied the timeline-style `ring-2 ring-sky-400` highlight without changing callers that omit selection state. sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Selected gallery items now render with the same `ring-2 ring-sky-400 rounded-lg` treatment, and the grid normalizes missing `selectedIds` to `false` so callers that omit selection state continue to render identically. The grid and item behavior tests cover both the selected and unselected paths.
